title: Combining Security Associations (SA Bundle) Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the process and decision logic for combining multiple Security Associations to create a secure communication tunnel.
relationships: SPD checks outbound packet to determine security needs
SAD is queried for existing SA that meets policy
If no SA exists, IKE negotiates a new one
Multiple SAs (ESP and/or AH) are combined into a bundle
Bundle is processed in transport or tunnel mode
Processed packet is sent through the secure tunnel
Responding host receives packet and queries SAD for SA
SA bundle is processed in reverse to authenticate and decrypt
